title: Prohibition of eviction from tax sale property
doc_html:
Art. 4736. Prohibition of eviction from tax sale property

            The procedures for eviction as provided by this Title shall be subject to the prohibitions and exceptions as provided by R.S. 47:2158.1 and 2231.1.

            Acts 2022, No. 404, §2.
